member.name: T:structIQe_Web_Library.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:structIQe_Web_Library.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:structIQe_Web_Library.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseHelper.MarkInProgressAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Call this immediately when the desktop picks up an action, before doing any real work. Prevents double-processing if the polling loop runs again before the action completes.

member.name: F:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.ProxyBaseUrl
member.summary: Base URL of the Vercel-deployed Express proxy. All Supabase traffic is routed through this endpoint.

member.name: T:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.ProxyLoginResult
member.summary: Result from proxy auth calls. Extends the concept of SupabaseLoginResult with additional fields returned by the proxy (user profile, access map).

member.name: P:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.ProxyLoginResult.User
member.summary: User profile from the proxy: id, email, name, company_id, company_name

member.name: P:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.ProxyLoginResult.AccessByModule
member.summary: Module access map (e.g., { "home": true, "mails": true })

member.name: P:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.ProxyLoginResult.AllowedModules
member.summary: Allowed navigation modules (filtered by user's access)

member.name: T:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.ProxyUser
member.summary: User profile shape returned by the proxy /api/auth/signin and /api/auth/me endpoints.

member.name: F:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.Http
member.summary: Shared HttpClient for proxy calls. No apikey header — the proxy handles Supabase authentication server-side. Authorization header is set per-request.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.SignInAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Authenticate via the proxy. Sends email + password to POST /api/auth/signin. The proxy authenticates against Supabase and returns tokens + user profile.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.GetMeAsync
member.summary: Verify the current session and fetch user profile via GET /api/auth/me. Sends the stored access token as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.SignOutAsync
member.summary: Sign out via the proxy. Sends the access token to POST /api/auth/signout for server-side revocation, then clears the local session.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.RefreshAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Refresh an expired session via the proxy. Sends the refresh token to POST /api/auth/refresh. Returns a new SupabaseSession with fresh tokens, or Nothing on failure.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.ChangeMyPasswordAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Change the current user's password via the proxy. Re-authenticates with old password server-side, then patches the new password. Throws on failure (caller catches).

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.TryAutoLoginAsync
member.summary: Attempt auto-login using saved sessions from SecureStore. Mirrors SupabaseHelper.TryAutoLoginAsync but routes all network calls through the proxy. Uses SupabaseProxy.RefreshAsync and SupabaseProxy.GetMeAsync instead of direct Supabase calls.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.SwitchToSessionByUserIdAsync(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Switch to an existing saved session by user ID. Refreshes via proxy if expired.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.SwitchToSessionAsync(structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseHelper.SupabaseSession,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Switch to a specific session. If the token is expired, refreshes it via the proxy. Mirrors SupabaseHelper.SwitchToSessionAsync but uses SupabaseProxy.RefreshAsync.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.SignOutUserAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Sign out a specific user by userId. If it's the current user, delegates to SignOutAsync(). Otherwise, best-effort revokes and removes from AllSessions + SecureStore. Mirrors Auth.vb SignOutUserAsync (lines 1131-1152).

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.SignOutAllAsync
member.summary: Sign out ALL cached sessions. Best-effort revokes each token via proxy, then wipes SecureStore. Mirrors Auth.vb SignOutAllAsync (lines 1155-1167).

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.RestRequestAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpMethod,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Send a request to the PostgREST passthrough proxy at /api/rest/{tablePath}. Automatically retries once on 401 after refreshing the access token. Returns the raw JSON response body as a String.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.RestRequestCoreAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpMethod,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Internal: send a single request to the proxy. Returns success flag, status code, and body.

member.name: T:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.RestResult
member.summary: Simple result tuple for RestRequestCoreAsync / ServiceRequestCoreAsync.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.ServiceRequestAsync(System.String,System.Net.Http.HttpMethod,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Send a request to a module-specific service endpoint (e.g. /api/access/me). Automatically retries once on 401 after refreshing the access token.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.GetMyEffectiveAccessAsync
member.summary: Get effective access for the authenticated user (server extracts userId from token).

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.PollMyPendingActionsAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Int32)
member.summary: Poll pending employee actions for a given company + employee.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.GetMyRequestedActionsAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Get actions requested by a specific employee.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.EnqueueActionAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String,System.Object,System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Insert a new employee action. Returns the new action id.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.PatchStatusAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Update the status (and optional error_message) of an employee action.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.GetSoftwaresOrderedAsync
member.summary: GET /api/licenses/softwares → returns key, name, software_order, version ordered by software_order ASC

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.GetAllSoftwares_ForDownloadAsync
member.summary: SELECT full columns FROM soft_softwares ORDER BY software_order ASC (for software downloads).

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.GetCompanyModuleTreeCacheByCompanyIdAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: SELECT tree_json FROM company_module_tree_cache WHERE company_id = {companyId} LIMIT 1

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.SupabaseProxy.MapErrorToUserMessage(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Map HTTP status codes and server error messages to friendly UI messages.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.structIQe_Web_Library.CompanyWorkspaceService.ListAsync(System.Boolean)
member.summary: List workspaces for the current company. Active-only by default.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.structIQe_Web_Library.CompanyWorkspaceService.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get a single workspace by ID.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.structIQe_Web_Library.CompanyWorkspaceService.CreateAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create a new workspace. Returns the created row (or existing if same name+path).

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.structIQe_Web_Library.CompanyWorkspaceService.UpdateAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Update workspace name and/or path. Pass Nothing to leave unchanged.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.structIQe_Web_Library.CompanyWorkspaceService.SetActiveAsync(System.Guid,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Activate or deactivate a workspace.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.structIQe_Web_Library.CompanyWorkspaceService.DeleteAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete a workspace. Returns True on success.

member.name: T:structIQe_Web_Library.structIQe_Web_Library.ProjectGroupsCacheResponse
member.summary: Internal wrapper — pa_3002 returns { success: true, data: { ... } }.

member.name: P:structIQe_Web_Library.structIQe_Web_Library.ProjectEntry.DisplayText
member.summary: ComboBox display: "PRJ-001 My Project"

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.structIQe_Web_Library.PgProject.LoadAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Load a single project by ID via the PostgREST passthrough.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.structIQe_Web_Library.PgProject.SaveAsync(structIQe_Web_Library.structIQe_Web_Library.PgProject)
member.summary: Upsert (insert or update) a project via the PostgREST passthrough.

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.structIQe_Web_Library.ProjectGroupService.GetProjectGroupsCacheAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Fetch the project groups cache for the authenticated user's company. Calls GET /api/project-groups/cache on pa_3002.
member.param: Project statuses to include. Defaults to {"ONGOING"}.
Include working/confidential directory paths per project.
Include group-level settings (project, quality, mail, drawing).

member.name: M:structIQe_Web_Library.structIQe_Web_Library.ProjectGroupService.GetProjectPathsAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Fetch working_directory and confidential_directory for a single project. Uses the PostgREST passthrough to query view_pg_projects_paths.

member.name: F:structIQe_Web_Library.User_Login.Login_window
member.summary: '''''' to ensure we can login multiple users in same session.
